achievements.title: Pest Control
achievements.description: Kill All the rats in the Cellar
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: It's Personal
achievements.description: As Kromlech, kill All the rats in the Cellar with barehands without being hit (unequip your weapon before entering the cellar) [Single Player]
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Wine Connoisseur
achievements.description: Complete Nebbish's side quest at the Elfsong Tavern during Chapter 1
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Aha ! A Secret Passage !
achievements.description: Find a secret passage inside the Cellar

achievements.title: Bugbear Chieftain
achievements.description: Kill the Bugbear Chieftain inside the Sewer of Baldur's Gate
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Hold my Potion !
achievements.description: Kill the Bugbear in Chapter 1 without using any potions [Hard Difficulty or above]
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Like a Ninja Turtle
achievements.description: Find your way through the Sewers in Chapter 1 and reach the Crypt
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Family Heirloom
achievements.description: Find and return Ipswitch's Medallion at the Elfsong Tavern during Chapter 1

achievements.title: Evil Artifact
achievements.description: Destroy the Orb inside the Crypt of Baldur's Gate
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Knock Out in Four Rounds
achievements.description: Kill the Orb of the Undead without letting it spawn more than 4 waves of undeads [Hard Difficulty or above]

achievements.title: Missing Person
achievements.description: Solve the mystery of what happened to Keissen and the orb and return to Osala during Chapter 1

achievements.description: Retrieve Keaira's lost spice box and bring it back to her at the Tavern during Chapter 1

achievements.description: Defeat Karne in the Thieves Guild during Chapter 1

achievements.title: Battle Mage
achievements.description: With Adryanna, Kill Karn in Chapter 1 without using any spell [Single Player - Hard Difficulty or above]
achievements.author: Vancleef

achievements.title: Running Man
achievements.description: As Vahn, finish the parkour between Karn and Xantam within 66 seconds without jumping (Start when using the first lever) [Single Player]
achievements.author: Vancleef
